headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals took a thrilling 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Marcell Ozuna's home run and three RBIs. The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Landen Roupp pitching 6.0 innings and allowing 0 earned runs. The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees, securing an 11-4 victory.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. The Washington Nationals' Ken Waldichuk has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness. The Texas Rangers have placed Chris Martin on the 15-day injured list with right shoulder impingement, Luis Curvelo with a right biceps strain, and Cody Bradford on the 60-day injured list with left elbow surgery rehab. The New York Mets have placed Jared Young on the 10-day injured list with a left meniscus tear, while the Colorado Rockies have placed Kyle Freeland on the 15-day injured list with left shoulder inflammation.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles. The New York Mets traded left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, and the Philadelphia Phillies traded right-handed pitcher Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations and international bonus pool money.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Thrilling 8-7 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 8-7 victory. Marcell Ozuna led the Nationals' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Landen Roupp pitching 6.0 innings and allowing 0 earned runs. Jung Hoo Lee led the Giants' offense with 3 hits and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Thrilling 9-10 Loss to Tigers**
top_news.summary: The Kansas City Royals came up just short, losing 9-10 to the Detroit Tigers in a high-scoring matchup. Salvador Perez led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Blast Past Yankees 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees, securing an 11-4 victory. Jo Adell led the Angels' offense with a grand slam and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals' Waldichuk Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Washington Nationals left-hander Ken Waldichuk has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, 2026, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
